steps.title: Identify what the constant represents
steps.content: The function $f(t) = 12t + 7$ has the linear form $mt + b$ where $b = 7$. This constant is the value of $f$ when $t = 0$.

steps.title: Evaluate $f$ at the time of purchase
steps.content:
Since $t$ counts months after purchase, $t = 0$ is the moment Maya bought the plant:
$$f(0) = 12(0) + 7 = 7 \text{ inches}.$$

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A: how long Maya keeps the plant is not represented in this model.
  • B: the monthly growth rate is the coefficient $12$, not $7$.
  • C: nothing in $f(t)=12t+7$ caps the length; it grows without bound, so 7 is not a maximum.
  • D: $7$ is the length at $t = 0$, i.e., when Maya purchased the plant.
That is the correct answer.
